title: Friends 910 - The One With Christmas In Tulsa
summary: Phoebe celebrates the holidays with her friends and helps Rachel search for hidden gifts in the apartment. She expresses her genuine appreciation for Chandler's surprise return, marking it as her favorite Christmas gift.

summary: Joey lands an audition for a role in a soap opera but struggles to act alongside his former co-star, who is now playing his mother. He seeks advice from Chandler and manages to overcome the awkwardness to secure the part.

summary: Monica enjoys her new job as a head chef but finds herself in an awkward position when Chandler's career shift threatens their living arrangement. She balances her professional ambition with her desire to maintain stability in her relationship.

summary: Phoebe discovers that a former street performer she knew has become a wealthy professional and feels conflicted about her own life path. She eventually finds satisfaction in her unique identity and experiences after a heart-to-heart with the group.

summary: Rachel prepares to return to work at Ralph Lauren but becomes anxious about her boss, Gavin, taking over her responsibilities. She ultimately confronts Gavin, leading to a professional rivalry that motivates her to return to her job sooner than planned.

summary: Chandler struggles with feeling too old as an advertising intern, but he eventually channels his age into a successful pitch for prototype sneakers. He gains confidence in his new career path by embracing his perspective instead of trying to be younger.

title: 916 - The One With The Boob Job

title: 916 - The One With The Boob Job

summary: Monica is eager to leave for a romantic weekend in Vermont and grows increasingly impatient while waiting for Emma to wake up. She eventually bonds with Emma and stays to celebrate the birthday with the group.

title: Friends - 1004 - The One With The Cake
summary: Phoebe is initially excited for the party, but her attention drifts to her own schedule, leading her to participate in a race to determine who can leave first. She ultimately returns to the apartment to ensure she does not miss the birthday celebration.

title: Friends - 1004 - The One With The Cake
summary: Rachel struggles to host the perfect first birthday party for Emma, facing delays and a disastrously shaped cake. She eventually finds closure and happiness when Ross fixes the cake and the group reunites to celebrate Emma's milestone.

title: Friends - 1004 - The One With The Cake
summary: Ross is determined to capture the perfect birthday message for Emma's future and experiences frustration as the party falls apart. He successfully manages to salvage the situation by reshaping the inappropriate cake and celebrating with his friends.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Amy seeks out Rachel for advice on her life and temporarily moves in with her, but her selfish behavior causes conflict. By the end, she decides to pursue a new career as a 'baby stylist' while maintaining her difficult personality.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Chandler supports Monica in their adoption efforts and helps Joey realize that he should write from the heart rather than trying to use big words. He is pleasantly surprised when the agency accepts Joey's unconventional letter.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Joey tries to sound intelligent for Monica and Chandler's adoption letter by overusing a thesaurus, which results in a ridiculous recommendation. He eventually learns to be himself and earns a positive reaction from the adoption agency.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Mike plans a romantic anniversary, but his proposal attempts are repeatedly undermined by awkward circumstances and Phoebe's reactions. He finally succeeds in proposing sincerely at a restaurant, leading to their engagement.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Monica seeks a letter of recommendation for adoption and worries that Joey's bizarrely written letter will ruin their chances. She is relieved when the agency interprets the letter as a charming, childlike gesture.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Phoebe navigates a rocky anniversary with Mike, leading to a public, failed proposal attempt at a Knicks game. Ultimately, she and Mike reconcile, and he successfully proposes to her at a restaurant.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Rachel attempts to mentor her sister Amy by encouraging her to be independent and self-sufficient, but she struggles when Amy's lack of boundaries leads to her piercing Emma's ears. Eventually, Rachel accepts Amy as she is and they bond over shared gossip, moving past the need to change her.

title: Friends - 10.05 The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
summary: Ross is protective of Emma and deeply disapproves of Amy watching her, especially after she pierces the baby's ears. He remains frustrated with Amy's behavior and lack of respect for his boundaries.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Benjamin uses his position as a grant administrator to try to win back his ex-girlfriend, Charlie, by sabotaging Ross's interview. He succeeds in winning Charlie back after confessing his lingering love for her.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Chandler attempts to avoid telling Joey he wasn't right for a commercial role by lying about watching his tape. He eventually confesses and accepts a humiliating punishment from Joey to regain his friendship.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Charlie introduces her new boyfriend, Ross, to her ex-boyfriend, Benjamin, hoping to help Ross secure a grant. Ultimately, she realizes she still has feelings for Benjamin and reconciles with him.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Joey tries to get cast in a commercial by Chandler, but Chandler lies about watching his audition tape. After discovering the lie, Joey makes Chandler wear blue lipstick to earn his forgiveness.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Monica competes with Rachel to possess the painting Gladys, eventually turning the competition into a prank war. She ends the episode by scaring Rachel with the second painting, Glynnis.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Phoebe struggles to let go of her artwork, Gladys, as she clears space for Mike to move in. She eventually solves the conflict by creating a second piece, Glynnis, to satisfy both Monica and Rachel.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Rachel engages in a prank war with Monica over the possession of the haunted painting, Gladys. She also plays a prank on Joey by convincing him the painting is haunted and scaring him repeatedly.

title: Friends - 10.06 - The One With Ross' Grant
summary: Ross interviews for a research grant with Charlie's ex-boyfriend, Benjamin, but becomes frustrated by unprofessional, personal questions. After discovering Benjamin is still in love with Charlie, Ross watches as Charlie reconciles with her ex, leaving Ross single again.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Chandler assists Monica in preparing for an adoption interview and manages the chaotic social situation involving Joey to ensure they receive a positive report.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: The charity representative initially accepts a large donation from Phoebe and Mike but ultimately decides to return the money so they can have a proper wedding.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Joey attempts to help his friends during their adoption interview but inadvertently complicates matters by revealing a past romantic history with the social worker.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Laura conducts an adoption interview for Monica and Chandler, during which she encounters a former romantic interest, Joey, but ultimately provides the couple with a positive report.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Mike supports Phoebe's desire for a wedding and helps her navigate the process of retrieving their donated funds from the charity.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Monica meticulously prepares for an adoption interview and successfully navigates a series of mishaps involving Joey to secure a spot on the adoption waiting list.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Phoebe decides to donate her wedding money to charity, but eventually realizes she wants a traditional wedding and successfully retrieves the funds.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Rachel faces her deep-seated fear of swings to help Emma enjoy the playground, eventually conquering the fear by forcing Ross to confront his own phobia of spiders.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study
summary: Ross tries to help Rachel overcome her childhood fear of swings, ultimately succeeding while managing his own struggle with a spider.

title: Friends - 10.08 The One With The Late Thanksgiving
summary: Chandler attempts to support Monica while hoping for news from their adoption agency. He is frustrated when their friends arrive late to dinner but is overjoyed when they finally get the call that they are going to be parents.

title: Friends - 10.08 The One With The Late Thanksgiving
summary: Joey misses Thanksgiving dinner to attend a Rangers game with Ross, leading to a series of attempts to sneak back into the apartment. He eventually gets his head stuck in the door chain and is covered in food, but he is forgiven when the group celebrates Monica and Chandler's adoption news.

title: Friends - 10.08 The One With The Late Thanksgiving
summary: Initially reluctant to host Thanksgiving, Monica is goaded into it by Phoebe and becomes obsessed with making it perfect. After being stood up by her friends, she is furious but eventually forgives them after receiving news from an adoption agency that she and Chandler have been selected to adopt a baby.

title: Friends - 10.08 The One With The Late Thanksgiving
summary: Phoebe manipulates Monica into hosting Thanksgiving by challenging her competitive nature. She later helps Rachel with the baby pageant and participates in the group's chaotic attempts to apologize for being late.

title: Friends - 10.08 The One With The Late Thanksgiving
summary: Rachel enters Emma into a beauty pageant to win money, causing her to be late for dinner. She spends the episode managing the fallout of her tardiness and the pageant activities before joining the group to celebrate Monica and Chandler's adoption.

title: Friends - 10.08 The One With The Late Thanksgiving
summary: Ross accompanies Joey to the hockey game, causing them both to be late for Thanksgiving dinner. He spends the episode trying to navigate the awkwardness of the situation before ultimately celebrating his friends' adoption news.

title: Friends - 10.09 - The One With The Birth Mother
summary: Chandler accompanies Monica to an adoption interview in Ohio where they are mistakenly identified as a doctor and a reverend. After admitting the truth, he risks their chances by being honest, but ultimately convinces the birth mother of their sincerity and suitability as parents through a heartfelt speech about Monica's maternal nature.

title: Friends - 10.09 - The One With The Birth Mother
summary: Erica is a pregnant woman considering adoption who initially chooses Monica and Chandler based on their perceived high-status careers. After discovering they lied, she initially rejects them but is eventually moved by Chandler's sincere honesty to reconsider them as potential parents.

title: Friends - 10.09 - The One With The Birth Mother
summary: Joey goes on a date with Phoebe's friend Sarah but struggles to control his possessiveness over his food. Despite his efforts to share, he eventually gives in to his impulses and eats her dessert, leading to another failed romantic encounter.

title: Friends - 10.09 - The One With The Birth Mother
summary: Monica travels to Ohio for an adoption interview and initially lies about her and Chandler's professions to appear more appealing. After the truth comes out and the birth mother initially rejects them, she is moved by Chandler's emotional plea and they are ultimately reconsidered for the adoption.

title: Friends - 10.09 - The One With The Birth Mother
summary: Phoebe attempts to set Joey up with her friend Sarah, only to be frustrated when his food-sharing rules ruin the date. She also helps Ross shop for a new outfit, accidentally contributing to his fashion mishap.

title: Friends - 10.09 - The One With The Birth Mother
summary: Rachel provides fashion guidance to Ross, helping him pick out new clothes for a date. She remains unaware that she accidentally helped him purchase a women's sweater until it is too late.

title: Friends - 10.09 - The One With The Birth Mother
summary: Ross seeks fashion advice from Rachel and Phoebe to impress a date, resulting in him buying a soft, high-end sweater that turns out to be a women's garment. Though he initially feels embarrassed, he continues to wear it because of its comfort, eventually commiserating with Joey over their shared romantic struggles.

title: Friends - 10.10 - The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
summary: Chandler attempts to keep his house-hunting a secret, leading his friends to mistakenly believe he is having an affair with a blonde woman. By the end of the episode, he reveals the truth about the house and shares the news of their successful offer with the group.

title: Friends - 10.10 - The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
summary: Joey is distressed by the idea of Chandler betraying Monica, but his confusion turns to relief once he learns about the house. He remains focused on his own interests, eventually asking for the realtor's contact information after learning Chandler isn't having an affair.

title: Friends - 10.10 - The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
summary: Monica and Chandler secretly search for a house in the suburbs to raise their future baby, fearing their friends' reactions. After their initial offer is rejected and the friends express their desire for them to stay, Monica and Chandler ultimately decide to move forward with the purchase of their dream home.

title: Friends - 10.10 - The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
summary: Phoebe becomes convinced that Chandler is cheating on Monica after spotting him with a woman and following them to a house. She eventually learns the truth about their move and struggles to accept that her friends are moving out of the city.

title: Friends - 10.10 - The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
summary: Rachel joins Phoebe in investigating Chandler's suspected affair, only to discover the couple is actually house-hunting. She initially tries to convince them to stay in the city, but eventually accepts their decision after receiving a thoughtful parting gift.

title: Friends - 10.10 - The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
summary: Ross is initially horrified by the prospect of Chandler cheating on his sister, but his feelings shift to sadness when he learns they are planning to move away. He ultimately struggles to process the change in the group dynamic but comes to terms with their life transition.

title: Friends - 10.11 - The One Where The Stripper Cries
summary: Chandler navigates his past college indiscretions with Ross, ultimately revealing the history of their shared romantic interests and uncovering the truth about their past encounters with Rachel and Monica.

title: Friends - 10.11 - The One Where The Stripper Cries
summary: Joey appears on the game show Pyramid where he struggles to give clues to his partner Gene, but eventually helps him win the prize money in the final round.

title: Friends - 10.11 - The One Where The Stripper Cries
summary: Monica hosts a bachelorette party for Phoebe where she is initially frustrated by a subpar stripper, but eventually discovers that she was Ross's accidental first kiss during their college years.

title: Friends - 10.11 - The One Where The Stripper Cries
summary: Phoebe is disappointed by her modest bachelorette party and the middle-aged stripper, but eventually finds entertainment in watching him perform his final dance.

title: Friends - 10.11 - The One Where The Stripper Cries
summary: Rachel helps organize Phoebe's bachelorette party and accompanies Phoebe to the hospital with the stripper after he becomes exhausted from his performance.

title: Friends - 10.11 - The One Where The Stripper Cries
summary: Ross confronts Chandler over a college pact regarding dating Missy Goldberg, only to learn that he and Chandler both kissed Rachel in college, before discovering he actually kissed Monica by mistake.

title: Friends - 10.12 - The One With Phoebe's Wedding
summary: Chandler feels insecure about being left out of the wedding party and lobbies hard for a role. He eventually secures the position of walking Phoebe down the aisle after a series of logistical changes.

title: Friends - 10.12 - The One With Phoebe's Wedding
summary: Joey is honored to be asked to walk Phoebe down the aisle and takes his role as a father figure very seriously. He eventually steps up to officiate the wedding ceremony when the original minister is trapped by the snowstorm.

title: Friends - 10.12 - The One With Phoebe's Wedding
summary: Mike is eager to marry Phoebe and remains supportive despite the constant wedding-related chaos and his mother's disapproval. He marries Phoebe in a romantic street ceremony and promises to spend his life with her.

title: Friends - 10.12 - The One With Phoebe's Wedding
summary: Monica takes charge of Phoebe's wedding planning with intense military-style precision, which eventually leads to friction and her being fired. She reconciles with Phoebe and manages the chaos of the outdoor wedding, ultimately finding fulfillment in the successful execution of the event.

title: Friends - 10.12 - The One With Phoebe's Wedding
summary: Phoebe struggles to keep her wedding plans simple while dealing with disasters, including a blizzard and her step-father's inability to attend. She eventually fires Monica as her planner to regain control and marries Mike in a beautiful, spontaneous outdoor ceremony.

title: Friends - 10.12 - The One With Phoebe's Wedding
summary: Rachel tries to navigate the awkward request from Phoebe to choose between Ross and Chandler for the final groomsman spot. She attempts to remain neutral but eventually helps facilitate the wedding during the blizzard.

title: Friends - 10.12 - The One With Phoebe's Wedding
summary: Ross desperately wants to be included in the wedding party and competes with Chandler for the final spot. He ends up walking the dog down the aisle and is left to clean up after the pet in the cold at the end of the night.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Chandler supports Monica in hosting Erica and becomes anxious upon learning that one of Erica's potential partners is a murderer. He is relieved when Monica determines that the criminal man is not the biological father.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Dr. Green is recovering from a heart attack and expresses his usual disdain for Ross when he finds him in his hospital room. He remains grumpy and difficult during his interaction with Ross.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Erica visits New York to see the sights and get to know Monica and Chandler. She candidly shares details about her past relationships, inadvertently causing concern for the couple regarding the baby's paternity.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Joey struggles to learn French for an audition after lying on his resume, eventually failing to get the part despite Phoebe's attempt to help him save face. He decides to be more honest about his actual skills while updating his resume with Phoebe.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Monica hosts the birth mother, Erica, and becomes concerned after learning Erica had relationships with two men, one of whom is a criminal. She eventually discovers that the criminal could not be the father, putting her mind at ease regarding the baby's parentage.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Phoebe attempts to help Joey learn French for an audition, but becomes frustrated by his inability to grasp the language. She ultimately tries to defend him at his audition by pretending he has a developmental disability and later helps him clean up his resume.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Rachel deals with the stress of her father's heart attack and feels vulnerable, leading her to proposition Ross for sex. When he refuses, she initially feels embarrassed and angry, but they eventually reach an understanding that their romantic connection remains a possibility.

title: Friends - 10.13 - The One Where Joey Speaks French
summary: Ross accompanies Rachel to support her during her father's medical crisis and acts as a caretaker, even refusing her request for sex to protect her from making a regretful decision. By the end of the episode, he acknowledges that their romantic connection is still alive.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela
summary: Chandler supports Monica's excitement about their new home and manages to convince a reluctant Joey that there is a place for him in their new life.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela
summary: Joey initially tries to sabotage Monica and Chandler's new house out of fear of losing his friends, but he eventually accepts their move after a conversation with a young girl named Mackenzie.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela
summary: Mike supports Phoebe's eccentric name change by adopting the name 'Crap Bag,' eventually persuading her to settle on a more traditional hyphenated name.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela
summary: Monica and Chandler prepare to move to their new house, and she remains patient with Joey despite his attempts to sabotage the house-hunting process.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela
summary: Phoebe decides to change her name to 'Princess Consuela Banana Hammock' for fun, but after Mike retaliates by changing his name to 'Crap Bag,' she agrees to hyphenate to 'Phoebe Buffay-Hannigan'.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela
summary: Rachel is fired from Ralph Lauren after her boss overhears her interviewing with a competitor, but she eventually secures a promising new job offer in Paris.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela
summary: Ross is thrilled to receive tenure at work, though he remains predictably jealous and insecure when Rachel reconnects with Mark for a potential job opportunity.

title: Friends - 10.15- The One Where Estelle Dies
summary: Chandler and Monica are house hunting in the suburbs when they run into their former acquaintance Janice, who attempts to buy the house next door. To prevent this, Chandler pretends to still be in love with her, successfully scaring her away from the property.

title: Friends - 10.15- The One Where Estelle Dies
summary: Joey fires his agent, Estelle, for poor performance but later feels guilty about his choice. He is devastated to learn of her death and struggles with the news while attempting to honor her at a memorial service.

title: Friends - 10.15- The One Where Estelle Dies
summary: Monica is excited about buying a house in the suburbs, but her plans are complicated when Janice shows interest in the neighboring home. She works with Chandler to devise a plan to ensure Janice does not become their neighbor.

title: Friends - 10.15- The One Where Estelle Dies
summary: Phoebe learns of Estelle's death and decides to hide the news from Joey to protect him from further emotional distress. She ultimately impersonates Estelle on the phone to give Joey closure after he fires her.

title: Friends - 10.15- The One Where Estelle Dies
summary: Rachel navigates a complex career dilemma after being offered her old job back with more money. She initially accepts to stay in New York, but eventually decides to pursue her dream of moving to Paris after Ross encourages her to follow her true ambitions.

title: Friends - 10.15- The One Where Estelle Dies
summary: Ross attempts to manipulate Rachel's career path by convincing her former boss to rehire her, hoping to prevent her from moving to Paris. Upon realizing how much she truly wants the opportunity, he selflessly supports her decision to leave.

title: Friends - 10.16 - The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
summary: Chandler helps pack for the move and navigates the discovery of mysterious handcuffs in the guest room. He is thrust into a chaotic transition as he and Monica rush Erica to the hospital for the birth of their baby.

title: Friends - 10.16 - The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
summary: Erica visits to get settled before her due date but unexpectedly goes into labor while at Monica and Chandler's apartment. She remains calm and guides Monica through the realization that the birth is imminent.

title: Friends - 10.16 - The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
summary: Joey struggles with Rachel's departure and unsuccessfully tries to get her to stay by flipping a coin. He also attempts to toughen himself up by letting Phoebe knee him in the crotch, only to find it ineffective.

title: Friends - 10.16 - The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
summary: Monica manages the stress of her upcoming move and Rachel's departure while preparing for her baby's arrival. Her night culminates in excitement and panic when she realizes Erica has gone into labor.

title: Friends - 10.16 - The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
summary: Phoebe offers Rachel a strange parting gift and tries to help Monica pack for the move. She also assists Joey in his misguided attempt to build pain tolerance by kneeing him.

title: Friends - 10.16 - The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
summary: Rachel struggles to say goodbye to her friends before moving to Paris, realizing it is too difficult to say goodbye to Ross because he means the most to her. She eventually confronts Ross, leading to a passionate reconciliation between them.

title: Friends - 10.16 - The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
summary: Ross feels hurt and insecure when Rachel seemingly avoids saying goodbye to him at her party. He confronts her at his apartment, where he learns the truth about her feelings, resulting in a passionate kiss.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Chandler experiences the overwhelming reality of fatherhood after discovering he is having twins and helps Monica pack up their apartment. He shares a final sentimental moment with Joey, deciding to let Joey keep the chick and the duck, before moving on to his new home.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Joey experiences the loss of his pets in the walls and helps Chandler destroy the foosball table to rescue them. He ultimately accepts the changes in his friends' lives and keeps the chick and the duck, cementing a new chapter for himself.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Monica navigates the shock of having twins instead of one baby and manages the emotional transition of moving out of her apartment. She successfully handles the physical labor of destroying a foosball table to save Joey's pets and ultimately leaves her keys behind as she prepares for her new life as a mother.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Phoebe acts as a supportive friend who encourages Ross to pursue Rachel and helps him navigate the chaotic journey to the airport. She remains a constant, optimistic presence as the group prepares to disperse.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Rachel attempts to leave for Paris but is stopped by Ross's emotional plea and a realization of her own feelings. She gets off the plane to commit to a future with Ross, choosing their relationship over her career move.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Ross grapples with the realization that he wants to be with Rachel and decides to pursue her at the airport despite obstacles. After a stressful journey, he reunites with Rachel and they both agree to stop playing games and be together.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Chandler struggles with the intensity of the hospital environment and the surprise of becoming a father to twins. By the end of the episode, he embraces his role as a parent and moves out of the apartment he shared with Monica.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Gunther takes the opportunity to confess his long-standing love for Rachel before she departs for Paris. He is touched when Rachel expresses affection for him in return, though she clarifies it is not the same kind of love.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Joey attempts to gift Monica and Chandler a chick and duck, but the birds go missing, leading him to destroy a foosball table to rescue them. He ultimately agrees to keep the birds at his place, providing a reason for the others to visit.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Monica manages the birth of her twins and navigates the shock of realizing they are having two babies instead of one. She ultimately moves out of her apartment, reflecting on the memories made there as she starts her new chapter as a mother.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Phoebe provides emotional support to Ross, encouraging him to fight for Rachel and helping him navigate the chaos of the airport. She celebrates the group's new beginnings and the birth of Monica and Chandler's twins.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Rachel prepares to move to Paris for a new job, believing her night with Ross was a final goodbye. She eventually decides to get off the plane after realizing she loves Ross and wants to be with him.

title: Friends - 10.17-10.18 - The Last One
summary: Ross realizes he is still in love with Rachel and decides to pursue her to the airport to confess his feelings. After a series of travel mishaps, he successfully reunites with her and they commit to a future together.
